description_long: This is a rectangular, military-style metal toolbox with a dark, weathered finish and visible signs of wear. The lid features a central, textured metal handle for carrying, and the box is reinforced with riveted edges and a robust hinge system. On two of the longer sides, there is a tan-colored label with a black bullet icon, suggesting the box is intended for ammunition or related tools. One short side has a prominent latch mechanism for securing the lid, while the opposite side shows the hinge assembly. The overall construction appears sturdy and utilitarian, suitable for rugged urban or industrial environments.
description: A rugged, rectangular metal toolbox with a central handle, bullet icon labels, and a secure latch, finished in a dark, weathered color.
description_view_0: End view showing the reinforced hinge assembly and plain, dark metal surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the central handle on the lid and a tan label with a black bullet icon.
description_view_2: Opposite end view featuring a prominent metal latch for securing the lid.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, with the handle and bullet icon label visible.
attribute_handle_type: Single folding metal handle, rectangular in shape, textured for grip, fixed to the lid with metal brackets.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single metal clasp latch, robust and padlock-compatible, located on the short side opposite the hinge.
attribute_compartment_configuration: No internal compartments or trays are visible; the box appears to be a single large compartment.
attribute_external_labeling: Tan label with black bullet icon on both long sides, centered.
